metadata.description: Personal collection of agent skills: small, reusable bundles of instructions for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: coding-python
plugins.description: Practical Python project setup, modern uv/ruff/ty/pytest workflows, PEP 723 scripts, and careful migration from legacy Python tooling.

plugins.name: brainstorming
plugins.description: Structured approach to brainstorming and design. Guides users through clarifying questions, proposing approaches, and writing design docs.

plugins.name: writing-plans
plugins.description: Create implementation plans from approved specs before code changes begin, with reviewer subagent checks.
